titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Muhammad Al-Nawfali
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Muhammad Al-Nawfali

segments: ه عن عليّ بن محمّد النوفليّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن أبيه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن خالد، عن أبيه، عن عليّ بن محمّد النوفليّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن عليّ بن محمّد النوفليّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن أبيه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن خالد، عن أبيه، عن عليّ بن محمّد النوفليّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Nawfali has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his father, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid, from his father, from Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Nawfali.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Nawfali has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his father, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid, from his father, from Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Nawfali.
